type_definitions.name: FsCatalogueLoader
type_definitions.description: Filesystem-backed CatalogueLoader: iterates tddd.enabled layers via load_tddd_layers_from_path and decodes each catalogue_file via catalogue_codec::decode with reject_symlinks_below guard. Implementation unchanged from previous track (Phase 2 overlay changes are in the domain renderer). Declared with action=reference.

type_definitions.name: FsContractMapWriter
type_definitions.description: Filesystem-backed ContractMapWriter: atomic_write_file with reject_symlinks_below guard, writing to track/items/<id>/contract-map.md. Implementation unchanged from previous track. Declared with action=reference.

informal_grounds.summary: Filesystem adapter implementing ContractMapWriter secondary port; writes contract-map.md with atomic_write_file guard. Implementation unchanged from previous track; declared here for contract-map edge visualisation. Promote to spec_refs once a spec element directly names this adapter.

type_definitions.name: LoadAllCataloguesError
type_definitions.description: Error variants returned by catalogue_bulk_loader::load_all_catalogues (infrastructure-internal free function, bridges to CatalogueLoaderError via FsCatalogueLoader::map_loader_error). This is the L4 counterpart declared in previous track — the isolated error type that lacked an edge source before free_function kind was added. No new variants in this track. Declared with action=reference.

type_definitions.name: TypeCatalogueCodecError
type_definitions.description: Error type for the catalogue codec (decode / encode operations). Phase 2 extends the codec to support free_function kind_tag (IN-09 / AC-01) by adding a new variant to TypeDefinitionKindDto. The existing variants are: Json (serde_json), Validation (SpecValidationError), UnsupportedSchemaVersion, InvalidEntry. Declared with action=modify to indicate Phase 2 codec extension for free_function kind dispatch.
